diagnostic: Due diligence tools find the problems. Business Infinity prevents them from existing. A company with versioned decision trails, institutional memory, and spec-driven governance passes due diligence by default.
answer: Due diligence tools find the problems. Business Infinity prevents them from existing. A company with versioned decision trails, institutional memory, and spec-driven governance passes due diligence by default.
description: Operational debt exposure — tribal knowledge, undocumented dependencies, spaghetti logic. One bad due diligence report kills a nine-figure deal.
symptom: A potential lead investor asks a deep question about infrastructure integrity, and the founder has to wait three days for an answer.
